why: Narrow the index to entries that match the parsed filters before scoring

output.console: Matched entries count and filter breakdown

success_handling.criteria: Index entries are filtered against parsed query criteria and a candidate set of matching entries is produced

error_handling.criteria: No entries in the index match the query filters
error_handling.action: Return empty result set, continue to semantic search which may find matches

event.message: No keyword matches found for query

decisions.outcome: Proceed to score-relevance step with matched entries
Proceed to semantic-search step (may find matches via vector similarity)
